elicited_inputs.additional_context: minced chicken, kept refrigerated since purchase

source_record_details.organism: Aerobic total spoilage bacteria (non-inoculated organism counted; Campylobacter spp. also tracked but separately)
source_record_details.conditions: raw, cut/minced, 1.5% NaCl in environment, refrigerated (4C) -- note: this record is a refrigerated survival study, not a room-temperature growth scenario
source_record_details.citation: Sampers et al. 2010, International Journal of Food Microbiology, 137:147-153

construction_notes: elicited_inputs constructed to match ALC_19 as found by eyeballing ComBase against known preprocessing steps -- combase_source_curve_id and ground_truth fields still need to be confirmed against the processed pipeline output (combase_food_modeling_grid_raw_phased.csv) before use. ALC_19 is constant 4C refrigerated, not a counter/warm-temperature scenario -- elicited narrative was adjusted to match rather than forcing the original warm-chicken framing onto this record. Not a generalization claim -- used to sanity-check the elicit -> infer -> verdict pipeline end to end.
